creator: freebsd.contact@marino.st
text:
Hi Bartek,

This isn't going to work.  py-demjson has been rerolled *again*.
Here's the checksum as of this morning:
SHA256 (demjson-2.0.tar.gz) =
24f638daa0c28a9d44db2282d46ea3edfd4c7d11a656e38677b741620bf1483d
SIZE (demjson-2.0.tar.gz) = 115914

Did you try contacting upstream?
Now they have rerolled at least twice the same file in a month I think
it's time to tell them that activity really hurts all packagers and they
need to stop.

If they give us the finger, then I suggest either hosting a source file
somewhere else or removing the port.  With the current rate of rerolls,
this s/w is not suitable for ports.

John
